title: Hidden store of manganese may have helped Earth get its oxygen
description: Computer simulations have uncovered a new manganese compound that could exist deep in Earth’s mantle and may be connected to the process that gave our atmosphere oxygen
author: Karmela Padavic-Callaghan

title: 'Transformative' pancreatic cancer drug doubles survival time
description: People with advanced pancreatic cancer taking an experimental daily pill lived nearly twice as long as those receiving chemotherapy infusions
author: Carissa Wong

title: How human error became a weapon against large language models
description: Alan Turing proposed a test for machine intelligence: could a computer convince a human it was human? We have begun conducting the same test on ourselves, writes Max Moser
author: Max Moser

title: Huge study of Alzheimer’s genetics identifies new drug targets
description: Almost 50 more genes have been flagged as being linked to Alzheimer’s, along with changes in activity in crucial cells that disappear as dementia progresses
author: Chris Simms

title: Geoengineering can thicken Arctic sea ice, but for how long?
description: Two companies are aiming to preserve Arctic ice by pumping water onto the sheet and letting it freeze, but only one of the trials found that this delayed melting in the summer
author: Alec Luhn

title: Photons behave very strangely if you try to cut them
description: Particles of light cannot be divided into smaller particles, but if you try to snip off the end of one, instead of shortening it multiplies
author: Karmela Padavic-Callaghan
